_description: Defines which Deep Dive panels are available for Colorado CDOT crash data based on state-specific columns

driverDemographics.label: Driver Demographics
driverDemographics.description: Age and gender analysis of drivers involved in crashes

speedIntelligence.label: Speed Intelligence
speedIntelligence.description: Posted speed limit vs estimated/stated speed analysis

driverBehavior.label: Driver Behavior & Human Factors
driverBehavior.description: Contributing driver actions and human factors analysis

vehicleFleet.label: Vehicle Fleet Analysis
vehicleFleet.description: Vehicle type distribution and severity correlation

nonMotorist.label: Non-Motorist Deep Dive
nonMotorist.description: Detailed pedestrian and cyclist crash analysis

crashSequence.label: Crash Sequence & Chain of Events
crashSequence.description: Multi-event crash chain analysis and secondary crash detection

locationDetail.label: Location & Community Detail
locationDetail.description: Community-level crash grouping and lane position analysis

animalDetail.label: Animal Crash Specifics
animalDetail.description: Wildlife type and seasonal pattern analysis

agencyMetadata.label: Agency & Jurisdiction Metadata
agencyMetadata.description: Reporting agency and road system classification

standardUnused._description: Standard columns now utilized in Dashboard and Ped/Bike tabs
